XML: <dialog id="dialog-0480"><header><button action="help" kind="secondary" label="Help"/></header><body><field id="status-field" type="select" required="true" label="Status"/></body></dialog>

Fix: {"attr":"id","op":"set_attr","path":"/dialog/header/button","value":"help-btn"}
